International Fund Raising Management Training Program Ended with Certificate Ceremony

28.03.2022

The "Fund Raising Management" program ended with a certificate ceremony, which was held on Friday, March 25.

The program which concluded with certifying 114 charity workers from 18 countries, was held on March 14-25, under the leadership and hosting of our university, in cooperation with Indiana University and Lilly Family School of Philanthropy, and Turk Kızılay.
